caption: The video appears to be a segment from a political news program titled "Plus Politics" on Plus TV Africa. The host, dressed in a suit and tie, is seated in a studio with a backdrop featuring a world map and the show's logo. He is engaged in a discussion or interview, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. On the right side of the screen, there is an inset image of Olusola Oyekanmi, identified as a political analyst from Lagos, who is participating via phone. The topic being discussed is related to Bola Tinubu, with the headline "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu" displayed prominently at the bottom of the screen. The overall setting suggests a professional and informative broadcast aimed at discussing current political issues in Nigeria.
